title: Select trim and fabric materials
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select trim and fabric materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.3 Work area is prepared and a range of trim materials is gathered for inspection according to workplace instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.3 Work area is prepared and a range of trim materials is gathered for inspection according to workplace instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.3 Work area is prepared and a range of trim materials is gathered for inspection according to workplace instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Select and inspect materials

pcs.text: Trim materials are selected against job and customer requirements2.2 Trim materials are checked for quality and reported if faulty
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trim materials are selected against job and customer requirements2.2 Trim materials are checked for quality and reported if faulty?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim materials are selected against job and customer requirements2.2 Trim materials are checked for quality and reported if faulty.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Select and inspect materials

elements.title: Determine attachment methods

pcs.text: Attachment material information is sourced and interpreted3.2 Attachment options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.3 Selected option is reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attachment material information is sourced and interpreted3.2 Attachment options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.3 Selected option is reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attachment material information is sourced and interpreted3.2 Attachment options are analysed and those most appropriate to the circumstances are selected3.3 Selected option is reported according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine attachment methods

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final material selection is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final material selection is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final material selection is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable material is collected and stored4.3 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.
